name: Eagle Finance
description_short: Eagle Loan Company offers personal loans from $1,000–$10,000 with same-day funding at 80+ branch locations across Kentucky, Ohio, and Indiana since 1998.
description_long:
Eagle Loan Company has operated as a personal installment lender since 1998, building a regional presence across the Upper South and Midwest. The company positions itself as a community-based lender with over 80 physical branch locations in Kentucky, Ohio, and Indiana, serving customers who need fast access to personal loans.

Eagle Loan specializes in personal loans ranging from $1,000 to $10,000 with fixed monthly payments and transparent upfront terms. Customers can apply online, sign documents at a local branch, and receive funds via direct deposit or check on the same day the loan is closed. The company reports loan activity to Equifax, allowing borrowers to build credit history through timely repayment. Their three-step process (Apply online, Sign at branch, Complete with funding) is designed for speed and convenience.

Eagle Loan differentiates itself through physical branch accessibility, same-day funding capability, and willingness to work with customers who have poor credit or recent bankruptcy. Customer testimonials highlight approval despite bankruptcy discharge, credit score drops, and first-time borrowing situations. The company explicitly markets itself as accommodating borrowers in challenging financial situations rather than requiring pristine credit profiles.

The loan amounts are modest ($1,000–$10,000 cap) and monthly payments are advertised as "affordable," though specific APR, fees, and term lengths are not disclosed on the website. Without rate transparency, borrowers cannot verify whether this lender's terms are competitive. The regional footprint (three states only) limits accessibility for customers outside these areas, and the lack of online funding (requiring branch visit) may inconvenience some borrowers despite the same-day option.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available when loan is closed at local branch—funds can be deposited directly into bank account
Operates 80+ physical branch locations across Kentucky, Ohio, and Indiana for in-person application and service
Willingness to approve borrowers with poor credit, recent bankruptcy discharge, or no credit history
Reports payments to Equifax credit bureau, enabling credit-building for customers with limited credit files
Transparent, fixed monthly payments with upfront terms clearly disclosed before closing
Long operating history since 1998 with 1,000+ active customers, providing market stability
Fast online application process with loan decision possible same day
cons: APR, specific interest rates, and fee structure not disclosed on website—borrowers cannot comparison shop before applying
Loan amounts capped at $10,000 maximum, limiting use for larger expenses or consolidation
Regional availability limited to Kentucky, Ohio, and Indiana only—not accessible to most U.S. consumers
Requires in-person branch visit to sign documents and close loan; no fully remote closing option
No information provided about credit score minimums, income requirements, or approval odds
best_for: Residents of Kentucky, Ohio, or Indiana needing $1,000–$10,000 quickly with same-day funding
Borrowers with poor credit or recent negative events (bankruptcy, defaults) seeking credit-building opportunities
First-time borrowers or those with thin credit files looking for an approachable lender
diagnosis: Eagle Loan is best for residents in Kentucky, Ohio, or Indiana with poor or thin credit who need $1,000–$10,000 and can visit a physical branch. The main caveat is the complete absence of rate and fee transparency on their website, making it impossible to assess whether their terms are competitive—always request and compare APR and total interest before committing.
services: Same-day loan funding via direct deposit
Same-day loan funding via check issuance
Monthly payment plans with fixed terms
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 10537 E Washington St Suite F, Indianapolis, IN 46229
